dramatic: Witness the dawn of a new era. 🌅🏛️

humble_beg: Spare a few crumbs for a weary developer? 🍞🩹
Is there any room in your heart for a lost cause like my PR? 🏚️❤️
I know I'm just a tiny speck in your universe, but... ✨🐜
I'm literally down to my last brain cell and half a paperclip. 🖇️🧠
I've hit the floor, and I think I've started digging. ⛏️🕳️
My pride is gone; only my PR remains. 🫥🍽️

If I don't get a review, tell my family I loved them. 🥀🪦
I'm not asking for much, just a review. 🤲✨
Consider this my final, desperate plea for your review. 🏛️⚖️
I am once again asking for your professional review. 🧤❄️
I'll be your best friend for exactly one (1) review. 🤝🍬
I'm drowning in the shallow end; please throw a review. 🏊‍♂️🛟
